scenes.title: A genuinely fresh agent
lines: No implementation chat. No product context.
Recover state and the next action from files only.

scenes.title: State recovered from repository files
lines: Blocker: product intent has not been received or accepted
Next: validate protocol and perform cold-resume review

scenes.title: The repository tells it what to run
Evidence checks its own evidence
lines: Exact write set: five records + one review
No repair, network, product work, or Git publication

scenes.title: Independent cold-resume verdict
lines: The agent recovered the project without chat history.
Next: separately reviewed intake of the user's master prompt.

scenes.title: Why this proof is not theatre
lines: Two earlier fresh reviews failed and blocked release.
They found a clock dependency, an evidence-contract conflict,
and bytecode created by the review itself.
All findings and the final pass are committed beside this recording.
